rationale: Conflux emits ~2 CFX per block at ~2 blocks/second (gross ~126M CFX/year from PoW) plus PoS staking rewards, but CIP-107/CIP-112 burn mechanisms (storage fees, base fee burning) partially offset gross issuance; observed total supply growth on CoinGecko over the trailing 12 months approximates ~4% net annualized inflation. The emission schedule is fixed-declining with no halving event but increasing burn pressure as network usage grows, pointing to a gradually declining net inflation rate over the next 24 months.
